hero.thesis: Launch a mobile dog wash service with subscription and one-off packages. Target pet owners looking for convenience in hygiene maintenance for their dogs.
hero.marketSize: The pet care industry is booming with a market size of $100 billion in the U.S. alone. Mobile grooming services are seeing a 15% annual growth rate.
hero.payingEvidence: Local pet services like 'PetClean Mobile' and 'WashPaws' are charging $60-$120 per wash, with recurring customers comprising 70% of their revenue.

ninetyDay.title: Foundation Setup

actions.action: Register your LLC via Stripe Atlas.
Open a business bank account and link it to Stripe for payment processing.
Purchase essential equipment: portable dog wash station, eco-friendly shampoos, towels.
actions.success: Equipment purchased and ready for use.

ninetyDay.metric: LLC, bank account, and equipment setup complete.

actions.action: Research local pet owners groups on Facebook and Reddit (e.g., 'Local Paws NYC').
actions.success: List of 5 active local groups compiled.

actions.action: Draft and post introductory messages in these groups offering a first-time discount.
Attend a local dog park meet-up and network with dog owners.
actions.success: Contact info for 10 potential customers collected.

ninetyDay.title: Launch the Service

actions.action: Create a simple website using Webflow to showcase services and pricing tiers.
Set up an email capture form on the website using ConvertKit.
Begin Google Ads campaign targeting local pet owners.
actions.success: Ads live and targeting specified audience.

ninetyDay.metric: At least 3 bookings through the website.

ninetyDay.title: Customer Acquisition & Feedback

actions.action: Send follow-ups to initial contacts with a booking link.
Perform first dog wash and request customer feedback.
Iterate on feedback to improve service delivery.
actions.success: Service adjustments made based on feedback.

ninetyDay.metric: 5 customer reviews collected with positive feedback.

ninetyDay.title: Refinement & Expansion

actions.action: Join and engage in 'Petpreneurs' Discord server.
Optimize Google Ads based on initial performance metrics.
Reach out to local veterinary clinics to establish referral partnerships.

ninetyDay.metric: 10% increase in website traffic from ads.

actions.action: Develop subscription packages and update website with new offerings.
Email existing customers offering a discounted rate for subscriptions.
Host a free dog wash day at a local park to promote subscriptions.
actions.success: Event held with at least 20 attendees.

actions.action: Streamline scheduling using Calendly for automated bookings.
Set up a Notion board to track appointments and customer preferences.
Evaluate supply chain for cost-effective supply purchases.
Design branded merchandise (e.g., bandanas) for customer loyalty.
Launch a social media campaign featuring customer testimonials.
Invite local pet influencers for a free wash in exchange for a post.
Attend a local business networking event to promote services.
actions.success: Contact info for 5 potential partners collected.

actions.action: Collaborate with a pet store to offer a joint promotion.
Create a referral program for existing customers.

ninetyDay.title: Customer Retention Strategies

actions.action: Survey existing customers for satisfaction and improvement suggestions.
Implement a loyalty program based on feedback.
Send personalized thank-you emails to all subscribers.

ninetyDay.metric: Increase in subscription renewal rate by 10%.

actions.action: Review financials and identify areas for cost reduction.
actions.success: Financial review complete with action items.

actions.action: Adjust pricing tiers if necessary based on cost analysis.
Plan budget for next quarter based on current performance.

ninetyDay.title: Future Planning & Scaling

actions.action: Evaluate the potential for expanding to new geographic areas.
Identify and train potential hires for scaling operations.
actions.success: First hire identified and training plan created.

actions.action: Set goals for next quarter and outline strategies to achieve them.

ninetyDay.metric: Ready to scale operations to a new area.

toolStack.name: Stripe Atlas
toolStack.why: For quick and easy LLC registration and financial operations.

toolStack.name: Webflow
toolStack.why: To create a professional website for service listings and bookings.

toolStack.name: ConvertKit
toolStack.why: For managing email marketing and customer communications.

toolStack.name: Calendly
toolStack.why: To automate scheduling and reduce missed appointments.

toolStack.name: Notion
toolStack.why: To organize and track customer information and operational tasks.

firstTenCustomers.script: Hi [Name], I'm launching a mobile dog wash service in [Niche]. As a pet owner, I thought you'd appreciate the convenience of a wash at your doorstep. I'd love to offer you a first-time discount. Interested?
firstTenCustomers.cadence: Reach out once, follow up after 3 days if no response.

pricing.raisingRules: Increase prices by 10% every 6 months if demand exceeds current capacity.

failureModes: Underpricing services leads to unsustainable margins.
Failing to follow-up with potential leads loses initial interest.
Ignoring customer feedback results in poor service reputation.
Neglecting online presence reduces customer reach.
Poor networking fails to capitalize on local partnerships.

setup.llc: Register your LLC using Stripe Atlas, which simplifies the process and helps manage business finances.
setup.payments: Use Stripe to handle all payment processing, ensuring secure and efficient transactions.
setup.contracts: Draft a simple service agreement using Lovable to outline terms with customers.
setup.insurance: Acquire general liability insurance to protect against potential on-site accidents.

scaling: Transitioning from a solo operation to a team involves careful planning. Start by identifying peak times when additional help is necessary. Hire part-time assistants, initially focusing on customer service and operational roles to manage bookings and logistics. Use Notion for team collaboration and tracking tasks. Train new hires on your service standards to maintain consistency. As more customers sign up, consider investing in additional mobile units and expanding your service area. Continuously refine your subscription offerings and enhance customer retention strategies to stabilize revenue. Aim to build a team culture that values customer satisfaction and operational efficiency.
